meta.pageTitle: BEST Token - Official Governance Token of Thailand Blockchain Association

hero.title: Thailand Blockchain Association BEST Officially Launches $BEST Governance Token!
hero.description: BEST (Blockchain Emergence Strategy Thailand), as a blockchain innovation association supported by the Thai government, has long been committed to promoting the deep integration of blockchain technology in finance, digital assets, trade, and industry upgrade. Today, we officially launch the $BEST token, marking the association's evolution from 'Policy Advocate' to 'Ecosystem Builder'.

presale.title: Presale
presale.paymentHint: Payment is a standard BEP-20 USDT transfer. Your wallet shows the official USDT contract; the transfer recipient is the presale deposit contract (on-chain), not a personal address. No token approval.

tokenFunctions.title: Token Functions
tokenFunctions.governance: Governance Voting: Determine activity priorities and partner selection
tokenFunctions.events: Event Privileges: Priority access to SIAM FRONTIER CAPITAL EXPO, Thailand Blockchain Week VIP tickets, closed-door roadshows
tokenFunctions.staking: Ecosystem Incentives: Staking rewards + service fee discounts + partner project airdrops
tokenFunctions.empower: Empower Community: Joint decision-making with the association to drive blockchain-traditional finance integration
tokenFunctions.connect: Connect Globally: Support projects to Nasdaq capital system, achieving 'Token-Equity Linkage'

tokenomics.title: Tokenomics
tokenomics.name: Token Name
tokenomics.liquidityValue: List on Binance, OKX, Coinbase; LP locked 1-2 years
tokenomics.communityDesc: Direct airdrop to members, summit participants, early contributors
tokenomics.treasuryDesc: Summit sponsorship, project incubation, legal compliance, DAO governance

utility.title: Core Utility
utility.governance: Governance: Propose and vote on major decisions
utility.events: Event Privileges: VIP tickets to Thailand Blockchain Week
utility.partners: Partner Incentives: Airdrops and priority investment rights

deflation.title: Deflation & Value Mechanism
deflation.tax: Trading Tax: 4% per tx (1% burn, 1% LP, 1% Staking, 1% Treasury)
deflation.buyback: Buyback & Burn: 30% of association revenue for market buyback
deflation.effect: Long-term supply reduction, value scales with association activity

roadmap.title: Roadmap
roadmap.q1: Q1 2026: Contract audit + Community airdrop + Thailand Blockchain Week exclusive benefits
roadmap.q3: Q3 2026: Cross-chain bridge + DAO governance platform
roadmap.q4: Q4 2026: Nasdaq concept project integration, $BEST payment settlement system
